name: AYO Technology Solutions Limited
summary: AYO Technology Solutions Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides information and communication technology (ICT) solutions in South Africa, rest of Africa, Europe, India, and the United States. It operates through Software and Consulting, Security Solutions, Unified Communications, Tracking Solutions, Health Care Services, and Managed Services segments. The company offers Enterprise Healthcare Information System, a centralized laboratory information system and health information exchange to the healthcare industry covering public and private health sector organizations; cyber security solutions to blue-chip multinationals, financial institutions, SOE's, and public sector clients, as well as data center infrastructure services; and ICT solutions. It also distributes the poly range of audio, video, and consumer products covering audio and video conferencing products, and headsets. Ayo Technology Solutions Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Cape Town, South Africa.
